name: neopixel
description: WS2812 (NeoPixel) and similar RGB LED strip control using ESP32 RMT peripheral.
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific LED driver.

classes.name: NeoPixel

constructor_params.name: n
constructor_params.description: Number of LEDs in the strip.

methods.name: NeoPixel.fill
methods.description: Set all LEDs to same color. (r,g,b) or (r,g,b,w) tuple.

methods.name: NeoPixel.write
methods.description: Send buffer to LED strip. MUST call after setting colors.

methods.name: NeoPixel.__setitem__
methods.signature: np[i] = (r, g, b)  # set LED i color

methods.name: NeoPixel.__getitem__
methods.signature: np[i]  # get LED i color as tuple

classes.example:
from machine import Pin
from neopixel import NeoPixel

np = NeoPixel(Pin(18), 8)  # 8 LEDs on GPIO 18
np[0] = (255, 0, 0)  # red
np[1] = (0, 255, 0)  # green
np[2] = (0, 0, 255)  # blue
np.write()

esp32_notes: Creates one RMT channel per NeoPixel object.
Maximum ~256 LEDs per strip (limited by RAM).
For APA106/SK6812, use bpp=4 for RGBW.
